name: 2pk Wood Candlestick Set - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring a hint of warmth to any space with this 2-Pack Wood Candlestick Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of wood, this set includes two candlesticks in a natural wooden hue that adds a classic touch to your decor. These candlesticks are made of wood and feature a spindle shape for a vintage vibe. You can place these on the mantel or console table for a seasonal touch of decor.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
